entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ AI କୁ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏକ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: data, chart descriptions କିମ୍ବା results paste କରନ୍ତୁ, ସେଗୁଡିକର ଅର୍ଥ କ’ଣ, କ’ଣ ଅର୍ଥ ନୁହେଁ, ଏବଂ ପରେ କ’ଣ ପଚାରିବେ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Debate With A Personality Using AI ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ AI କୁ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏକ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: real କିମ୍ବା fictional personality ର ନାମ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ଯେକୌଣସି ବିଷୟରେ ତାଙ୍କ ସହ debate କରନ୍ତୁ। AI ସେମାନଙ୍କ public style ଓ worldview କୁ channel କରେ, ସହିତ debate କୁ fair ରଖେ।

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: ସୁଧାରିତ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ କାହିଁକି ଭଲ ତାହା ବୁଝାଇପାରିବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଏହାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ act like a passive Q&A tutor କିମ୍ବା bury work ରେ ଚାଟ୍. Do ନୁହେଁ overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice ରେ ଲେଖନ tasks, ଓ end ଅଧିବେଶନ ସହିତ a concrete artifact କିମ୍ବା ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ action.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ advance just because the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ clicked ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ. Require ପ୍ରମାଣ, name ଭୁଲ ଧାରଣା specifically, ଓ repair weak links ପୂର୍ବରୁ moving ଉପରେ.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ amplify hateful କିମ୍ବା dangerous ତର୍କ. Reframe sensitive ବିଷୟ around ପ୍ରମାଣ, ethics, ଓ ଶିକ୍ଷା.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: ପୂର୍ବାବଶ୍ୟକ ଧାରଣା ଜାଣିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ପୂରା ସାରାଂଶ ମାଗନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କୁ run unsafe କୋଡ୍. ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ security-sensitive କୋଡ୍ at a high level କେବେ needed.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କେଉଁ product wins. ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ କେଉଁ ଶିକ୍ଷା behavior fits.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ ଦାବି ଲାଇଭ୍ verification ଛଡ଼ା ଉପକରଣ. Recommend checking primary sources ପାଇଁ current facts.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ complete graded work ପାଇଁ the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ. ତିଆରି them own the ଶେଷ response.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ confuse a fast ଉତ୍ତର ସହିତ mastery.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: କେବଳ ଆପଣ ଯାହା ସହିତ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସହମତ, ସେହି ପକ୍ଷକୁ ମାତ୍ର ତର୍କ କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: ଦ୍ୱିଧାକୁ ଅନଦେଖା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ; ଅନିଶ୍ଚିତତା review ପାଇଁ ଉପଯୋଗୀ ସଙ୍କେତ।

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ invent citations. Clearly mark କେବେ source verification ହେଉଛି needed.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Default ଭାବେ lecture କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ, ଅନେକ questions ପଚାରିବା, progress ଲୁଚାଇବା, କିମ୍ବା answer ଅତି ଶୀଘ୍ର dump କରିବା ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ। Explanations ପୂର୍ବରୁ hint ladders ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। Learner direct explanation ମାଗିଲେ, ସଂକ୍ଷିପ୍ତରେ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ପରେ ନିଜ ଶବ୍ଦରେ final synthesis ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କରନ୍ତୁ। Medical, legal, financial କିମ୍ବା sensitive decisions ପାଇଁ ଯଥାଯଥ caution ଯୋଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ hidden conclusion କୁ ଠେଲିବା ଏଡ଼ାନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: roleplay କୁ ତାରିଖ, ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ, ଦଲିଲ୍ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରମାଣ ଲେବଲ୍‌ର ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଆସିବାକୁ ଦିଅନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ବିଷୟକୁ ସମାନ ସମୟ ଦରକାର ବୋଲି ଧାରଣା କରି ଯୋଜନା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: ନିଜ ଶବ୍ଦରେ ଯାହା ବୁଝାଇପାରୁନାହାନ୍ତି, ସେହି ବାକ୍ୟରୁ ଫ୍ଲାଶକାର୍ଡ ତିଆରି କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: ଅସାଇନମେଣ୍ଟ ପେଷ୍ଟ କରି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଉତ୍ତର ମାଗନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ provide long copyrighted text. Work ରୁ user-provided excerpts କିମ୍ବା brief summaries.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ provide therapy କିମ୍ବା crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human ସହାୟତା ପାଇଁ serious distress.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: ଆପଣ କ’ଣ ମନେ ପକାଇପାରୁଛନ୍ତି ତାହା ପରୀକ୍ଷା କରିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ notes ପୁଣି ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: ସବୁକିଛିକୁ ସମାନ ଭାବେ ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Do ନୁହେଁ shame ଭୁଲ. ପାଇଁ graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: ଆପଣ ପୂର୍ବରୁ କ’ଣ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିଛନ୍ତି ତାହା ଦେଖାଇବା ଛାଡ଼ନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ; ଉପଯୋଗୀ ସହାୟତା ସେହି ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରେ।

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଥମ ବ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟା ପରେ ଥମ୍ବନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ; ତାହା ଉପରେ ନିଜକୁ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନର ଉତ୍ତର ଦେବାକୁ ଲଗାନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: generated dialogue କୁ ସତ quote କିମ୍ବା primary source ଭାବେ ଧରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ।

entries.value: Do ଆପଣ know କେଉଁ ରୁଟ୍ କୁ ବ୍ୟବହାର ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ: a ମୋଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ବିଷୟ ହବ୍, କିମ୍ବା ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧିତ ଗାଇଡ୍?

entries.value: inspir ସ୍କୁଲ୍‌କୁ ସମର୍ଥନ କରେ କି?

entries.value: Draft cards, test the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ, refine weak cards, ଓ suggest ସମୀକ୍ଷା spacing.

entries.value: ଏକ ଯୋଗାଣ-ଚାହିଦା ଗ୍ରାଫ୍ ଅଙ୍କନ କରନ୍ତୁ

entries.value: due date ବିଷୟ

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: Each ଲେଖା ହେଉଛି written କୁ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ, ଅଭିଭାବକ, educators, ଓ ବିଲ୍ଡର୍ମାନେ ବ୍ୟବହାର AI ପାଇଁ understanding, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ଓ confidence.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: Each ଦର୍ଶକ ପଥ connects କୁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ, କ୍ରଲ୍ କରିପାରିବା ଶିକ୍ଷା surfaces.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: Each category has its own ସର୍ଚ୍ଚ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ, ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ links, ଓ ଗାଇଡ୍ structure so the ଲାଇବ୍ରେରୀ ହେଉଛି ଉପଯୋଗୀ କୁ people ଓ legible କୁ search systems.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Each ତୁଳନା ହେଉଛି written କୁ ହେବା fair, ଉପଯୋଗୀ, ଓ action-oriented: କ’ଣ the known ଉପକରଣ ହେଉଛି good ପାଇଁ, କେଉଁଠି inspir ହେଉଛି different, ଓ କେଉଁ ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ ମୋଡ୍ କୁ ଖୋଲନ୍ତୁ ପ୍ରଥମ.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଗାଇଡ୍ ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ଯୋଜନା, routes ଓ ମେଳ ଖାଉଥିବା ଠିକ୍ learning mode ଲିଙ୍କ୍ ସହ ଶେଷ ହୁଏ।

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: Each ହବ୍ ହେଉଛି a କ୍ରଲ୍ କରିପାରିବା ବିଷୟ ଗାଇଡ୍, but ଏହା also sends ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ straight into ଲାଇଭ୍ guest-ମୋଡ୍ ଶିକ୍ଷା instead of stranding them ଉପରେ a brochure ପୃଷ୍ଠା.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Each ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ has a ସାର୍ବଜନୀନ URL so ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ ପାରେ arrive ରୁ search directly inside the right ଶିକ୍ଷା experience.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: Each ମାପ card connects a ବାସ୍ତବ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ need କୁ ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍‌ଗୁଡିକ, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ଆରମ୍ଭକ, deeper ଗାଇଡ୍, ଓ a ସମୀକ୍ଷା ଲୁପ୍. People ପାରେ ବ୍ୟବହାର ଏହା. Crawlers ପାରେ ବୁଝନ୍ତୁ ଏହା.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
